data.title: NUBURU Re-Activates 70% Acquisition of Tekne, Advancing Global Defense & Security Platform Targeting €100M+ Revenue
data.description: In Denver, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU) unveiled a new agreement to purchase a 70% controlling interest in Tekne S.p.A. The deal, announced today, pertains to the dual-use Defense & Security platform company's focus on non-kinetic effects, directed-energy technologies, electronic warfare, and software-orchestrated defense systems. This agreement marks a significant move for NUBURU, aimed at bolstering its strategic acquisition framework as outlined in its previous announcements.

data.title: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Update on the Commercial Launch of CARDAMYST™ (etripamil) Nasal Spray for the Treatment of PSVT
data.description: In March 20, 2026, Milestone® Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: MIST) disclosed its financial performance for the last quarter and full year closing on December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Montreal and Charlotte, N.C., specializes in developing and marketing groundbreaking cardiovascular drugs. A significant highlight was the approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for CARDAMYST™ (etripamil) nasal spray. This approval allows for the conversion of acute symptomatic episodes of paroxysmal supraventricular tachycardia (PSVT) to sinus rhythm in adults. Additionally, the company launched the product during this transformative year.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich Hosts 29th Annual Dallas Cosmetic Surgery and Medicine Meeting Now Underway in Dallas
data.description: The 29th Annual Dallas Cosmetic Surgery and Medicine Meeting for 2026 is currently taking place in Dallas, showcasing international developments in cosmetic surgery, technology, and patient safety. Leading plastic surgeon and educator, Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, is spearheading the event.
